title: No longer able to use write_smt2 with circuits that have async-reset FFs (without clk2fflogic)

features.name: async_reset_always_block
features.description: Code should include an always block with asynchronous reset sensitivity list (posedge clk or negedge rst)

features.name: sdff_cell_type
features.description: Code should include a $sdff cell type (scoped dynamic flip-flop) which is not supported by write_smt2 backend

features.name: adff_cell_type
features.description: Code should include an async-reset flip-flop cell type $adff before async2sync conversion
